description_long: This house features a striking, futuristic design with smooth, flowing curves and an organic form, set on a landscaped green base with scattered trees. The main structure is elevated and appears to have a cantilevered upper story with large, continuous window bands wrapping around the facade. The surrounding grounds are intricately landscaped with angular, sculptural elements and pathways, creating a dynamic interplay between built and natural environments. The exterior is predominantly white, with a sleek, seamless finish that emphasizes the modern aesthetic. The house appears to have multiple entry points, with the main entrance integrated into the curving form and accessible via a gently sloped path. The overall impression is of a high-end, architect-designed residence that blends contemporary architecture with landscape art.
description: A futuristic, curvilinear white house with a cantilevered upper story, set on landscaped grounds with sculptural elements and trees. The design features large window bands and a seamless, modern exterior.
description_view_0: From this angle, the house's sweeping curves and the main entrance area are visible, along with landscaped paths and several trees.
description_view_1: This view highlights the cantilevered upper story and the integration of angular landscaping elements around the house.
description_view_2: The elongated side of the house and the continuous window bands are prominent, with the sculptural landscaping extending outward.
description_view_3: The rear of the house shows the layered, rounded roof and more of the landscaped green space, with fewer visible entry points.
attribute_entryway_design: Integrated into the curved facade, flush door, no visible porch, accessed by a gently sloped path, minimalistic and seamless
